title: Oakhill Matrics achieve 100% Bachelor Pass
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"SCHOOL NEWS - Oakhill School's matric class of 2025 has achieved an exceptional set of results in the Independent Examinations Board (IEB) National Senior Certificate examinations, once again upholding the school's long-standing tradition of academic excellence.","html":"SCHOOL NEWS - Oakhill School's matric class of 2025 has achieved an exceptional set of results in the Independent Examinations Board (IEB) National Senior Certificate examinations, once again upholding the school's long-standing tradition of academic excellence."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The class distinguished itself through strong individual performances and a consistently high collective standard.","html":"The class distinguished itself through strong individual performances and a consistently high collective standard."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"It is with great pride and admiration that we congratulate the Oakhill matric class of 2025 on their impressive final matric results,\" said Head of School James Cross."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This year's performance represents a highly commendable milestone and speaks volumes about our students' perseverance and dedication.","html":"\"This year's performance represents a highly commendable milestone and speaks volumes about our students' perseverance and dedication."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Beyond the classroom, this group has been an invaluable asset to our school, leaving behind a lasting legacy of commitment and excellence. We celebrate not only their academic achievements, but also the remarkable individuals they have become.\"","html":"\"Beyond the classroom, this group has been an invaluable asset to our school, leaving behind a lasting legacy of commitment and excellence. We celebrate not only their academic achievements, but also the remarkable individuals they have become.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Liam Hayward and his parents, Barry and Deborah Hayward.","html":"Liam Hayward and his parents, Barry and Deborah Hayward."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"100% Bachelor Degree pass rate","html":"100% Bachelor Degree pass rate"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The class of 2025 achieved an outstanding 100% pass rate, including an exceptional 100% Bachelor Degree pass, qualifying every candidate for tertiary study.","html":"The class of 2025 achieved an outstanding 100% pass rate, including an exceptional 100% Bachelor Degree pass, qualifying every candidate for tertiary study."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The cohort of 26 matriculants achieved a total of 51 subject distinctions, averaging 1.96 distinctions per candidate, with 12 distinctions awarded at 90% and above."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Aidan Brewer and his mother, Tanya Locks.","html":"Aidan Brewer and his mother, Tanya Locks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The group also achieved a commendable overall grade average of 71%, reflecting both depth and consistency across the class.","html":"The group also achieved a commendable overall grade average of 71%, reflecting both depth and consistency across the class."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"National level","html":"National level"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Two Oakhill pupils were placed in the top 1% in individual subjects at national level: Aidan Brewer for mathematics and computer applications technology, and Kay-Lane Cloete for life orientation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Maia Wildeman and parents, Tanya and Euan Wildeman.","html":"Maia Wildeman and parents, Tanya and Euan Wildeman."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dux Scholar","html":"Dux Scholar"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Special recognition is extended to Dux Scholar Kay-Lane Cloete, who earned Outstanding Achievement with six distinctions and an aggregate of 85%."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ester Mwanza and her proud mother Lusekelo Mwanza.","html":"Ester Mwanza and her proud mother Lusekelo Mwanza."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Aidan Brewer and Ester Mwanza were awarded Commendable Achievement, each earning five distinctions. All three achieved overall A-aggregates, as did Liam Hayward and Maia Wildeman.","html":"Aidan Brewer and Ester Mwanza were awarded Commendable Achievement, each earning five distinctions. All three achieved overall A-aggregates, as did Liam Hayward and Maia Wildeman."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Four students, Liam Hayward, Maia Wildeman, Keagan Prigge and Hannah Morris, each achieved four distinctions, while Jamie Hardy and Kylie-Rose Nelson earned three distinctions each.","html":"Four students, Liam Hayward, Maia Wildeman, Keagan Prigge and Hannah Morris, each achieved four distinctions, while Jamie Hardy and Kylie-Rose Nelson earned three distinctions each."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Keagan Prigge and his mother, Fiona Prigge.","html":"Keagan Prigge and his mother, Fiona Prigge."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A further 10 candidates achieved one or two distinctions, highlighting the collective strength of the cohort.","html":"A further 10 candidates achieved one or two distinctions, highlighting the collective strength of the cohort."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Education beyond the classroom","html":"Education beyond the classroom"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oakhill continues to encourage achievement beyond the National Senior Certificate.","html":"Oakhill continues to encourage achievement beyond the National Senior Certificate."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hannah Morris with her mother, Sallyanne Morris.","html":"Hannah Morris with her mother, Sallyanne Morris."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Hannah Morris completed the Trinity International Music Examination with a result exceeding 70%, while several students sat the Further Studies English and Mathematics examinations, demonstrating the breadth and ambition of the class."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Matric results mark a significant milestone, reflecting years of learning, effort and preparation. At Oakhill, we support every student as they grow and prepare for future academic and career opportunities,\" said Sonja Victor, Deputy Head (Academics).","html":"\"Matric results mark a significant milestone, reflecting years of learning, effort and preparation. At Oakhill, we support every student as they grow and prepare for future academic and career opportunities,\" said Sonja Victor, Deputy Head (Academics)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Applications","html":"Applications"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Scholarship opportunities are available through the annual Oakhill College Scholarship, with applications closing in February 2026.","html":"Scholarship opportunities are available through the annual Oakhill College Scholarship, with applications closing in February 2026."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Further information is available on the Oakhill website.","html":"Further information is available on the Oakhill website."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jamie Hardy and her parents, Laila and Kevin Hardy.","html":"Jamie Hardy and her parents, Laila and Kevin Hardy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
